---
name: Planning / Spec
about: Define mapping plan and technical spec before implementation
labels: [planning]
---

## Objective
Define the mapping plan and technical spec for the **Kujo Beatdown** Beat Saber custom map so implementation can begin with clear direction.

## Scope
- Confirm source track/version and metadata
- Confirm BPM/timing baseline
- Define target difficulties and style goals
- Document contribution workflow

## Checklist
- [ ] Confirm song metadata (title, artist, track version/source)
- [ ] Confirm BPM and timing offset baseline
- [ ] Validate start/end trimming and silence handling
- [ ] Define target difficulties (e.g., Hard / Expert / Expert+)
- [ ] Document style goals (energy curve, pattern style, emphasis points)
- [ ] Document anti-patterns / constraints (comfort/readability rules)
- [ ] Add collaboration workflow (branching, PR expectations, review flow)
- [ ] Add testing expectations for contributors

## Acceptance Criteria
- Mapping direction is documented and unambiguous
- Timing/BPM decisions are explicit and reproducible
- Difficulty roadmap is approved
- Contributors can begin mapping without clarification questions

## Deliverables
- Updated planning doc or README section
- Final spec summary comment in this issue

## Notes
Use timestamp references when calling out key musical moments.
